name: KOOB DOG
short_description: You are a dog. Bark, Jump, Sprint, and Zoom to collect all the treasures and escape the TV! Master the speed of your paws and the might of your leap to traverse All Five Worlds in this handcrafted adventure.
detailed_description:
You are a dog in this 3D Platforming throwback adventure!

Chomp Ice Kubes, collect Cartridges, Discs, Vinyl, and Hidden Treasures within each level!
Every levels Collectible Vinyl unlocks in-game music, with over a dozen tracks!
Return to any completed level and grab the hourglass to start a Time Trial!

Return to the HUB WORLD between levels to admire your collection and listen to your Vinyl.
Completing Worlds rewards you with Denim Washes to customize your Vest.

Collecting each Worlds Collectables unlocks their corresponding Zoomie Level!

Do you have what it takes to escape the TV, unlock the Secret Levels, and ultimately be a Good Boy?
